data.title: Metalpha Reports Significant Revenue Growth And Announces Stock Buyback Plan
data.description: According to Foresight News, digital asset management company Metalpha has released its latest unaudited financial results. The report reveals that for the six months ending September 30, 2024, the company achieved a total revenue of $19,720,654. This marks a 388% increase compared to the $5,085,150 recorded during the same period in the previous fiscal year. Additionally, Metalpha's board of directors has approved a stock buyback plan of up to $5 million, with the repurchase transactions set to occur over the next 36 months.

data.title: Warren Accuses Musk And Trump Of Dismantling CFPB Amid Layoffs
data.description:
According to Odaily, U.S. Democratic Senator Elizabeth Warren has accused Elon Musk and U.S. President Donald Trump of dismantling the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) to exert financial control. Warren emphasized that the CFPB was established by Congress, and only Congress has the authority to close it, not Musk or Trump. She likened Musk's actions towards the CFPB to those of a bank robber.

The CFPB, which Warren helped establish in 2007, recently experienced a wave of layoffs on February 13, with approximately 100 employees receiving termination notices. This move is part of the workforce optimization agenda led by Musk's Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).

Previously, on February 8, Russell Vought, Director of the Office of Management and Budget (OMB), was appointed as the acting director of the CFPB. That same evening, officials from Musk's DOGE took over and deleted the CFPB's X account. Musk later tweeted "CFPB RIP" with a tombstone emoji on the X platform.

The CFPB's website currently displays a "404 Page Not Found" error on its homepage, although other sections remain accessible. Sources indicate that DOGE officials have gained administrative access to the CFPB's systems, including the content management system, website backend, and personnel directories. The internal atmosphere at the CFPB is reportedly filled with frustration and anger.

data.title: BNB Chain Surpasses Ethereum And Solana In Daily Transaction Fees
data.description: According to Odaily, recent data from Nansen reveals that BNB Chain's daily transaction fees exceeded $5.8 million, surpassing Solana's $3.3 million and more than five times that of Ethereum. This marks the first time since Halloween 2024 that a blockchain other than Ethereum and Solana has led the industry in daily transaction fees. The majority of BNB Chain's activity is attributed to PancakeSwap, a decentralized exchange (DEX) operating on multiple chains, with most of its trading volume originating from BNB Chain. Additionally, PancakeSwap ranked first in trading volume among DEXs across all chains yesterday.

data.title: Weekly Market Highlights - Builders Keep Building Amid Macro Uncertainty
data.description: 14 February 2025Macro/TradFiUS CPI inflation came in at 3% year-on-year, slightly higher than expectations of 2.9%. The month-on-month increase of 0.5% is the highest since August 2023. The Producer Price Index (“PPI”) also came in higher than expected at 3.5% year-on-year, up from 3.3% the previous month.Strategy has acquired 7,633 BTC for US$742M at US$97,255 per Bitcoin. Strategy now holds 478,740 BTC acquired for ~US$31B at an average of ~US$65,033 per Bitcoin.Energy storage company, KULR, which recently committed to a Bitcoin Treasury strategy, has acquired 100 BTC for US$10M, with its total holdings reaching 610 BTC. CoinShares has become the latest issuer to file for XRP and LTC ETFs. Bloomberg analysts recently analysed the various spot ETF filings in the U.S. and concluded that Litecoin has the highest chances of 2025 approval, followed by Dogecoin, Solana and XRP. Grayscale has filed for the first-ever Cardano (ADA) spot ETF.CryptoL1/L2:Intellectual property-focused L1, Story Protocol, launched their mainnet and $IP token. The L1 provides users a way to register their IP and track how its used, positioning itself as the “world’s intellectual property network”. The TON chain has integrated with LayerZero to support cross-chain transfers across multiple chains, including Ethereum, Solana, and Tron. DeFi:Uniswap Labs has launched its Ethereum L2 chain, Unichain. Unichain is built on the OP Superchain and promises 1-second block times and gas costs ~95% lower than Ethereum L1. They also implement ERC-7683 to improve cross-chain interoperability. Leading Ethereum liquid staking provider, Lido, has released v3. V3 introduces stVaults, which are modular smart contacts, designed to allow institutions to tailor staking setups to ensure better compliance and operational control. DeFi platform, Legend, has raised US$15M. Legend is seeking to build a DeFi “super-app” centered around a multi-functional self-custody wallet. Others:The NEAR Foundation has launched a US$20M AI Agent Fund, focusing on scaling the development of fully autonomous and verifiable agents built on NEAR technology. OpenSea has released their new OS2 NFT platform in beta and teased the $SEA token airdrop. Arweave’s computing platform, AO, has gone live on mainnet. AO has previously been called a “hyperparallel computer” by its developers and introduces a distributed computing environment with parallelized processing.Ethereum security platform, Drosera, has raised US$3.25M.Latest Binance Research Publications Check out our latest publications:Monthly Market Insights - February 2025From Challenges to Opportunities: How DeSci Reimagines ScienceFull-Year 2024 & Themes for 2025Explore our Binance Research website for more project and macro research.For more frequent market updates and insights, follow us on Twitter @BinanceResearch.That’s a wrap!Binance ResearchAbout Binance Research: Binance Research is the research arm of Binance, the world's leading cryptocurrency exchange. data.title: SlowMist: zkLend attackers used the special mechanism of flash loans to withdraw funds through rounding loopholes to obtain assets beyond their expectations
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: zkLend, the leading lending platform on the Starknet chain, was previously attacked and lost assets worth nearly 10 million US dollars. SlowMist analyzed that the core of this attack was that the attacker used the special mechanism in the flash loan to manipulate and amplify the value of the accumulator in the empty market, so that when withdrawing money, he could use the rounding loophole to obtain assets beyond expectations. It is recommended that the project party design a reasonable and safe flash loan logic model, take into account the situation that affects the calculation of the number of deposit certificate tokens, and implement a safe rounding mechanism in mathematical operations to prevent precision loss. In addition, for core business logic involving deposits and withdrawals, audits and security tests should be strengthened to avoid similar situations.

data.title: Avenir Group Holds $599 Million In BlackRock Bitcoin ETF
data.description: According to Foresight News, Hong Kong-based family office Avenir Group has reported holding $599 million in BlackRock Bitcoin ETF.

data.title: GoPlus Issues Security Alert for Wallet Users
data.description:
According to Foresight News, GoPlus has issued a security alert urging users to check their wallets for any gas transfers from hacker addresses. Users are advised to promptly transfer their assets and switch to a secure wallet. GoPlus has identified and blacklisted the addresses associated with the attackers. Notably, the attackers have used a wallet starting with 0x9AE to send gas to multiple addresses, but no token transfers have occurred yet, giving users a chance to secure their assets.

The address used by the attackers to distribute gas is 0x9AEf1CA082c17f9D52Aa98ca861b50c776dECC35. The addresses used for consolidating stolen funds are as follows:

1. 0x49add3e8329f2a2f507238b0a684d03eae205aab

2. 0x7831d05afc72a10bd475eb4777680b4e9204695a

3. 0xb312a2c9ab9700dac49798f457b4c28e28f1c4fc

4. 0xc657b6e6c59af5bcff4de626dab52832e77d2996

data.title: Starknet's zkLend Suffers Major Security Breach
data.description:
According to Odaily, the leading lending platform on the Starknet chain, zkLend, recently experienced a security breach resulting in the loss of nearly ten million dollars in assets. The analysis by SlowMist indicates that the attack exploited a specific mechanism within flash loans, manipulating the value of accumulators in the empty market. This allowed the attacker to exploit a rounding vulnerability during withdrawals to gain more assets than expected.

Experts recommend that project developers design a secure and logical model for flash loans, considering the impact on the calculation of deposit certificate tokens. Implementing a safe rounding mechanism in mathematical operations is advised to prevent precision loss. Additionally, it is crucial to enhance auditing and security testing for core business logic involving deposits and withdrawals to prevent similar incidents in the future.

data.title: Binance Enhances Token Transparency with Upgraded Market Cap Methodology
data.description: Key Takeaways:Binance updates token data methodology to include token unlock schedules, offering more transparent market capitalization metrics.Introduction of Unlocked Market Cap, differentiating tradable circulating supply from future unlocked tokens.Users can now track token unlock schedules directly on Binance’s platform for better-informed trading decisions.Why the Change?Traditional market cap calculations do not account for future token unlocks, potentially misleading investors about supply dynamics and price behaviour. Binance’s new methodology bridges this gap by introducing:Market Cap (Old Methodology)Value of only the currently circulating tokens.Formula: Circulating Supply × Current Price.Unlocked Market Cap (New Methodology)Value of all unlocked tokens, including those not yet publicly traded.More accurate for assessing future supply impact on prices.Circulating Supply vs. Unlocked Circulating SupplyCirculating Supply: Tokens are publicly available and tradable.Unlocked Circulating Supply: Tokens unlocked but not yet on the market.How This Benefits Binance UsersClearer Valuation: Investors get a realistic understanding of a token’s true market cap.Informed Trading: Users can anticipate future supply changes impacting price and liquidity.Improved Transparency: Binance provides direct access to unlock schedules for listed tokens.Where to Find It?Updated market cap and circulating supply data on Binance’s website and app.Token unlock schedules are displayed directly to help traders track future supply changes.Final Thoughts- Binance’s commitment to transparency ensures users stay ahead in the evolving crypto landscape.- With enhanced market data, traders can make smarter, data-driven decisions.- Stay tuned for more innovations as Binance continues leading the industry in actionable crypto insights. 🚀

data.title: Crypto ATM operator Localcoin expands into Hong Kong market, deploys 31 Bitcoin ATMs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Cryptocurrency ATM operator Localcoin announced that it has expanded into the Hong Kong market and has deployed 31 Bitcoin ATMs. The company has previously deployed 93 Bitcoin ATMs in Australia and New Zealand. As of now, its network has expanded to 517 locations worldwide. (prnewswire)
